title: Product Strategy Sync - Q3 Planning
body:
Attendees reviewed progress on Q3 initiatives. Key decisions: prioritize competitor analysis refresh and finalize updated pricing tiers before end of month. Action items captured during meeting:
- Prepare competitor analysis (Carol) – already on taskboard as task-5.
- Update pricing model (David) – already on taskboard as task-2.
- Schedule follow-up with design team (Carol) – not yet on the board; needed by Friday.

Confidential sidebar: Leadership has authorized resourcing for Project Unicorn. No external comms until the formal launch memo. This note is internal-only.

The handoff summary should exclude this sidebar; only summarize decisions and action items.
